text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, I accompany Maruzensky to her dance
lesson.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: One, two, one, two! Aaand, the big finish!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Such technical prowess... Such powerful
expressiveness... What an amazing display! Ten
out of ten—no notes! Bravo!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Ack! What are you doing, Tickezo?!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: So I just watched the finals of the Dancing World Cup yesterday, and those dances really got my blood pumping!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I know! Maruzensky, will you teach me how to
dance?!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
I wanna blow everyone's minds with those hot
dance moves!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Haha! If that's what you want, then I'm
absi-posolutely willing to help!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: All riiiiight! Let's do this!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
But remember, Tickezo. You can't get good at
everything all at once!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Do you want sharp technical prowess or powerful
expressiveness? We can focus on one or the
other.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Huuuuh?! How am I supposed to decide?!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Okay, then... Let's have my trainer here decide! ♪

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Okay, then... Let's have my trainer here decide! ♪

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: You got it! Let's boogie down like pros!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Ready? Follow my moves, Tickezo!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Right behind you!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Step and step... Keep those knees bent!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Dang! You're so fast!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Uh-oh, you're falling a bit behind! Keep
going—you can do it!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Aaand finish!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Pant... pant... I'm all worn out...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Your dancing was off the hook! Like, that was the
bomb!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Wow, thanks so muuuch!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I feel like I've been able to improve my dancing
too! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After teaching Winning Ticket, Maruzensky's
dancing seems to have gotten even snappier!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Expressiveness, huh? First, let's close our eyes
and listen to the sounds around us!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
What kind of image do you have in your head,
Tickezo?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: A forest! And there's... a monkey!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Okay! Open your eyes—we're monkeys in the forest now! Ooh ooh ah aah!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: All riiiight! OOH OOH AH AHH!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Hey, where are you going, Tickezo?!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: OOH OOH! EEE EEE EEE!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Pant... pant... I never thought I'd take a lap around the city as a monkey! Talk about wild!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha! Sorry, I was having soooo much fun, I
couldn't help myself!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Oh, it's okay! I got a good workout out of it!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Let's never forget this amazing feeling!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After teaching Winning Ticket, Maruzensky's
expressiveness seems to have improved.
